hero.headline: Your moment deserves the perfect photographer
hero.description: Lomissa is a photography marketplace connecting clients with professional photographers. Browse, book, and receive your photos — all in one place.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.heading: Book a photographer in minutes
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore hand-picked photographers and find the perfect match for your style and budget.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See real availability, pick a date that works and book in minutes. No back and forth.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Have your session and receive your professionally edited photos through Lomissa.

trust.label: WHY LOMISSA
trust.heading: Every photographer is hand-picked
trust.vettedDesc: Every photographer on Lomissa goes through a personal review process. Only the best make it.
trust.bookingDesc: See real availability and book in seconds. No waiting, no back and forth emails.
trust.reviewsDesc: Every review comes from a real client who completed a real session. No fake ratings.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.body: By accessing or using Lomissa (lomissa.com), operated from Bergen, Norway, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. These terms apply to all registered users, including clients seeking photography services (Clients) and professionals offering their services (Photographers). If you do not agree to these terms, you may not use the platform.

s2.title: 2. The Role of Lomissa
s2.body: Lomissa is purely a digital marketplace designed to connect Clients with independent Photographers. We are not a photography agency, and we do not employ the Photographers. We provide the technological infrastructure for discovery, communication, secure file delivery, and payment processing. The actual photography service is a direct contract between the Client and the Photographer.

s3.title: 3. Bookings, Payments, and Escrow
s3.intro: To build trust and ensure security for both parties, Lomissa operates a secure escrow payment system powered by Stripe Connect.
s3.item0: Upfront Payment: When a Client books a session, the full session fee is authorized and captured upfront.
s3.item1: Escrow Hold: These funds are held securely in a digital escrow account and are not immediately transferred to the Photographer.
s3.item2: Release of Funds: The funds (minus Lomissa's 10% commission) are only released to the Photographer's connected Stripe account after the high-resolution photos have been officially delivered through the Lomissa platform, and the standard 7-day Dispute Window has passed without the Client raising a valid issue.

s4.title: 4. Cancellations, Disputes, and Refunds
s4.item0: Cancellations: If a Client cancels a booking prior to the session, the refund amount is determined by the Photographer's stated cancellation policy. However, third-party payment processing fees (e.g., Stripe processing fees) are non-refundable and will be deducted from any refund issued to the Client.
s4.item1: Dispute Window: After the Photographer delivers the final photos via the platform, the Client has exactly 7 days to review the work. If the work is severely deficient, undelivered, or violates the agreed-upon scope, the Client may raise a formal dispute through the platform.
s4.item2: Dispute Resolution: During a dispute, the escrow funds remain frozen. Lomissa administration will review platform audit logs, communications, and delivery files to make a binding decision to either release the funds to the Photographer or issue a refund to the Client. Lomissa's decision in a dispute is final.

s5.title: 5. Photographer Obligations and Commission
s5.intro: By joining Lomissa as a Photographer, you agree to:
s5.item0: Provide professional services as advertised on your profile.
s5.item1: Deliver all final high-resolution files directly through Lomissa's secure delivery system. Bypassing the platform for delivery will prevent your escrow funds from being released.
s5.item2: Pay a 10% commission on all completed bookings, which is automatically deducted from the final payout to cover platform operations, escrow management, and support.

s6.title: 6. Platform Circumvention
s6.body: You may not use Lomissa to connect with a Client or Photographer and then complete the booking or payment outside of the platform to avoid the 10% commission. Engaging in fee avoidance or circumvention is a material breach of these terms and will result in the immediate and permanent termination of your account.

s7.title: 7. Content, Ownership, and Intellectual Property
s7.item0: Portfolio Content: Photographers retain full copyright of all photos they upload. By uploading images to your public profile, you grant Lomissa a non-exclusive, worldwide license to display these images on the platform and in our marketing materials to promote your services.
s7.item1: Delivered Photos: The usage rights for the final photos delivered to the Client are determined by the agreement between the Client and the Photographer. Lomissa claims no ownership over private delivery files.
s7.item2: Originality: You may only upload photos that you have personally taken and have the legal right to display.

s8.title: 8. Reviews and Conduct
s8.body: Clients may leave reviews following a completed booking. Reviews must be truthful, respectful, and based on actual experience. We reserve the right to remove reviews that contain hate speech, harassment, or provably false information. Harassment, discrimination, or abusive behavior toward any user or platform administrator will result in immediate account suspension.

s9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
s9.body: Lomissa is not legally responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of the photography services provided. We are not liable for any damages, missed events, or losses resulting from a Photographer's failure to perform or a Client's failure to attend. In any event, Lomissa's total liability to you for any claim arising from your use of the platform is strictly limited to the amount of commission fees Lomissa retained from your transactions in the three (3) months prior to the claim.

s10.title: 10. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
s10.body: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of Norway. Any legal disputes arising from these terms or your use of the Lomissa platform shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Bergen, Norway.

s11.title: 11. Contact Information
s11.body: For questions regarding these Terms, disputes, or platform support, please contact us at:

s1.title: Who We Are
s1.body: Lomissa is a photography marketplace operated from Bergen, Norway, connecting clients with professional photographers worldwide. We are the data controller for personal data collected through lomissa.com. This privacy policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we use and protect it.

s2.title: What Data We Collect
s2.intro: Depending on how you use Lomissa, we may collect:
s2.item0: Account information: name, email address, and password when you register
s2.item1: Booking details: session date, location, package selected, and messages exchanged with photographers
s2.item2: Payment data: billing details handled by Stripe (we never store full card numbers)
s2.item3: Usage data: device type, browser, pages visited, and interaction timestamps via analytics

s3.title: How We Use Your Data
s3.body: We use your data to operate the platform: process bookings, facilitate payments, send transactional emails, and provide customer support. We may also use aggregated, anonymised data to improve our services. We do not sell your personal data to third parties, and we do not use it for targeted advertising.

s4.title: Legal Basis for Processing
s4.intro: We process your personal data on the following legal bases:
s4.item0: Contract: to fulfil your booking and deliver the services you requested
s4.item1: Legitimate interests: to prevent fraud, maintain platform security, and improve our services
s4.item2: Legal obligation: to comply with tax, accounting, and other applicable regulations
s4.item3: Consent: for optional communications such as newsletters (you may withdraw consent at any time)

s5.title: Data Retention
s5.body: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. Booking records are kept for seven years to comply with Norwegian accounting legislation. If you request account deletion, your personal information is anonymised within 30 days, subject to any legal retention obligations. Anonymised data may be retained for statistical purposes.

s6.title: Who We Share Data With
s6.item0: Stripe – payment processing and Connect payouts (Stripe Privacy Policy applies)

s7.title: International Transfers
s7.body: Some of our service providers operate outside the European Economic Area. Where data is transferred outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission. Stripe, Supabase, and Cloudinary all maintain Data Processing Agreements compliant with GDPR.

s8.title: Data Security
s8.body: We take the security of your data seriously. All data is transmitted over HTTPS, passwords are hashed, and access to production systems is restricted. Payment data is handled exclusively by Stripe and never passes through our servers. We conduct regular security reviews and promptly address any vulnerabilities identified.

s9.title: Your Rights
s9.intro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
s9.item0: Access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and the right to object — contact us at hello@lomissa.com to exercise these rights
s9.item1: Right to lodge a complaint with your national supervisory authority (in Norway: Datatilsynet, datatilsynet.no)

s10.title: Cookies
s10.body: Lomissa uses essential cookies required for authentication and session management. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. By using the platform, you consent to the use of these essential cookies. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though this may affect platform functionality.

s11.title: Children's Privacy
s11.body: Lomissa is not intended for use by individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.

s12.title: Changes to This Policy
s12.body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time to reflect changes in our services or legal requirements. We will notify you of significant changes by email or by displaying a notice on the platform. The date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last revised. Continued use of Lomissa after changes take effect constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

s13.title: Contact Us
s13.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your rights, please get in touch:
